name: Form: Submit

description.en: Submit your details to register as a contact for follow-up.
description.de: Hinterlasse deine Daten und werde als Kontakt für die Nachverfolgung erfasst.
description.fr: Laissez vos coordonnees pour etre ajoute comme contact pour le suivi.
description.es: Deja tus datos para ser anadido como contacto para el seguimiento.
description.ro: Lasa-ti datele pentru a fi adaugat ca si contact pentru follow-up.

bot: Use this to capture lead information from a form. After the user submits, the data is forwarded to the appropriate JoAi warp via the 'next' chain — e.g. @joai-contact-create for lead capture. Tags from the URL (e.g. ?tags=webinar-2026-04) segment the contact by source. The optional `context` query param is appended to the notes for source attribution.

inputs.name: Name
inputs.bot: Full name of the person submitting the form.

inputs.name: Email
inputs.bot: Email address of the lead — used for follow-up.

inputs.name: Notes

description.en: Anything you would like us to know (optional)
description.fr: Ce que vous souhaitez nous dire (facultatif)
description.ro: Ceva ce ai vrea sa ne spui (optional)

inputs.bot: Optional free-form notes from the submitter — e.g. their interest, question, or context.

description.en: We use these to follow up with you.
description.de: Wir nutzen diese Angaben für die Nachverfolgung.
description.fr: Nous les utilisons pour vous recontacter.
description.ro: Le folosim pentru a reveni catre tine.

description.en: Optional — helps us prepare for our conversation.
description.de: Optional — hilft uns, das Gespräch vorzubereiten.
description.fr: Facultatif — nous aide a preparer notre echange.
description.es: Opcional — nos ayuda a preparar la conversacion.
description.ro: Optional — ne ajuta sa pregatim discutia.

success.en: Thanks {{name}}! We will be in touch soon.
success.de: Danke {{name}}! Wir melden uns bei dir.
success.fr: Merci {{name}} ! Nous reviendrons vers vous bientot.
success.ro: Multumim {{name}}! Vom reveni catre tine in scurt timp.
